description_long: This is a well-worn baseball with a classic two-tone design, featuring a dark, heavily scuffed upper hemisphere and a lighter, tan lower hemisphere. The surface is covered in visible cracks, scratches, and discoloration, indicating extensive use and age. Prominent stitching runs along the seam, joining the two leather panels in a traditional baseball pattern. The stitches are light in color and stand out against the darker and lighter leather sections. No visible brand logos, league markings, or manufacturer names are present on the surface. The overall texture is rough and aged, with significant wear concentrated on the darker portion.
description: A heavily worn, two-tone baseball with cracked leather, visible stitching, and significant surface scuffing. The ball shows no visible logos or markings.
description_view_0: The view highlights the dark, scuffed upper hemisphere and the tan lower half, with prominent stitching and extensive surface wear.
description_view_1: This angle emphasizes the tan leather section, showing more cracks and scratches, with the seam curving across the ball.
description_view_2: The dark, worn leather dominates this view, with the seam running vertically and heavy scuff marks visible.
description_view_3: Similar to view 1, this side shows the tan leather with cracks and the seam curving, but with less visible dark scuffing.
attribute_stitch_pattern: Two curved seams with light-colored stitches, running in a traditional baseball pattern, evenly spaced and prominent against the leather.
attribute_visible_wear_or_scuff_marks: Extensive scuff marks, cracks, and discoloration are visible, especially on the dark upper hemisphere and along the seams. The surface appears rough and aged throughout.
